message.content:
### App Content Analysis (Mobile Screen)

#### **Header Section**
- **Profile Area**: 
  - Left: Circular profile photo (small, white background)
  - Middle: Text "Bruno Pau." (white, sans-serif, regular weight)
  - Right: 
    - "Menu" button (white text, small, uppercase)
    - "Download CV" button (white text, small, uppercase)
    - Language toggle: "PT" / "EN" (white text, small, uppercase, with "EN" highlighted/active)
- **Background**: Black (top bar)

#### **Hero Section**
- **Text Elements**:
  - "HELLO, MY NAME IS BRUNO" (green, uppercase, sans-serif, bold)
  - "And I build websites." (green, sans-serif, bold, slightly larger than above)
  - "Full Stack MERN Developer |" (white, sans-serif, regular)
  - "MongoDB - Express - React -" (white, sans-serif, regular)
  - "Node.js | Creating efficient," (white, sans-serif, regular)
  - "scalable web applications" (white, sans-serif, regular)
  - "focused on user experience." (white, sans-serif, regular)
- **Layout**: Vertical stack, centered. Spacing: ~1.5x line height between lines.
- **Colors**: Green text on dark gradient background.

#### **Projects Section**
- **Heading**: "Projects" (white, sans-serif, bold, uppercase)
- **Content**: Empty rectangular placeholder (dark gray, rounded corners, ~80% width, centered below heading)
- **Spacing**: Large gap (~2x line height) between hero text and "Projects" heading.

#### **Background**
- **Gradient**: Dark-to-light transition (black → deep green → purple) vertically, darker at top.
- **Overall**: Dark theme with gradient emphasis.

#### **New Content vs. Previous Screen**
- **Added Elements**:
  - Full professional description (MERN stack, UX focus)
  - "Projects" section heading + placeholder
  - Language toggle ("PT"/"EN")
- **Removed/Changed**:
  - No longer just "HELLO, MY NAME IS BRUNO" – expanded to include role and tech stack.
  - Hero text now includes "And I build websites." (new line)
  - Header now includes language toggle and "Download CV" button.
- **Visual Shift**: From minimal hero text to detailed professional intro + projects section.
